summary: Oak & Pixel Studio builds refined websites, booking experiences, client portals, integrations, and ongoing digital presence management for trust-driven businesses.

services.name: Signature Plan
services.answer: A professional digital foundation with a premium website up to 5 pages, booking integration, lead capture, domain and hosting management, maintenance, 2 monthly content updates, and email support. Pricing is R25,000 setup plus R4,499/month.

services.name: Growth Plan
services.answer: The core OPS offering for growing businesses, with everything in Signature plus up to 10 pages, landing pages, onboarding journeys, document collection, CRM integration, payment integration, 5 monthly content updates, and priority support. Pricing is R40,000 setup plus R6,999/month.

services.name: Premium Plan
services.answer: A highly tailored digital ecosystem with everything in Growth plus bespoke digital experiences, advanced animations, tailored journeys, client portal implementation, advanced integrations, monthly optimization reviews, and a dedicated account lead. Pricing is R65,000 setup plus R12,499/month.

services.name: Digital Experience Scope
services.answer: A focused scoping conversation for matching the right OPS plan to the client journey, website requirements, integrations, and support needs.

questions.question: What does Oak & Pixel do?
questions.answer: Oak & Pixel Studio designs, builds, and maintains premium websites, booking experiences, client portals, integrations, and digital presence systems.

questions.question: Where is Oak & Pixel based?
questions.answer: Oak & Pixel is based in Randburg, Gauteng, South Africa.

questions.question: How do I contact Oak & Pixel?
questions.answer: Email info@oakandpixel.co.za, call +27 (75) 089 0614, use WhatsApp at https://wa.me/27750890614, or submit the contact form on the website.
